title: Fluent Forever
author: Gabriel Wyner
subline: How to learn any language fast — and never forget it.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- 4 nested speech bubbles, each smaller, in different languages (transliterated). The outermost is 'hello' in English; the innermost is the same in the target language — 'hola' (Spanish). One is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Outermost bubble (English) -->
    <path d="M -560 -200 Q -580 -280 -480 -300 Q -440 -360 -320 -340 Q -260 -380 -160 -360 Q -100 -400 0 -380 Q 80 -400 140 -360 Q 240 -380 320 -340 Q 440 -360 480 -300 Q 580 -280 560 -200 L 540 -120 L 580 0 L 540 60 L 560 100 Q 580 180 480 200 Q 440 280 320 260 Q 240 300 140 280 Q 80 320 0 300 Q -100 320 -160 280 Q -260 300 -320 260 Q -440 280 -480 200 Q -580 180 -560 100 L -540 60 L -580 0 L -540 -120 Z" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="0" y="-100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="40" font-weight="300" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="-0.02em">hello</text>
    <!-- Bubble 2 (French) -->
    <path d="M -380 -120 Q -400 -180 -320 -200 Q -280 -240 -200 -220 Q -140 -260 -60 -240 Q 0 -260 60 -240 Q 140 -260 200 -220 Q 280 -240 320 -200 Q 400 -180 380 -120 L 360 -60 L 400 40 L 360 80 L 380 120 Q 400 180 320 200 Q 280 240 200 220 Q 140 260 60 240 Q 0 260 -60 240 Q -140 260 -200 220 Q -280 240 -320 200 Q -400 180 -380 120 L -360 80 L -400 40 L -360 -60 Z" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.7"/>
    <text x="0" y="-40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="34" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="-0.02em">bonjour</text>
    <!-- Bubble 3 (German) -->
    <path d="M -240 -50 Q -260 -110 -180 -130 Q -140 -160 -80 -150 Q -20 -180 40 -150 Q 100 -180 160 -150 Q 220 -160 240 -110 L 220 -50 L 260 30 L 220 60 L 240 100 Q 260 150 180 170 Q 140 200 80 180 Q 20 200 -40 180 Q -100 200 -160 180 Q -220 200 -240 150 Q -260 100 -240 50 L -220 30 L -260 -10 Z" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <text x="0" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="-0.02em">guten tag</text>
    <!-- Innermost bubble (Spanish) RED -->
    <path d="M -140 0 Q -160 -60 -100 -80 Q -60 -110 0 -100 Q 60 -110 100 -80 Q 160 -60 140 0 L 120 40 L 160 80 L 120 110 L 140 140 Q 160 180 100 200 Q 60 220 0 210 Q -60 220 -100 200 Q -160 180 -140 140 L -120 110 L -160 80 L -120 40 Z" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="0" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="-0.02em">hola</text>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">FOUR LANGUAGES DEEPER · ONE FLUENT FOREVER</text>
</svg>
rationale: Four nested speech bubbles, each smaller than the last. Outer to inner: 'hello' (English, ash), 'bonjour' (French, ash), 'guten tag' (German, ash), 'hola' (Spanish, RED 3px). The Spanish bubble is the target — what fluency looks like. The composition is a Russian-doll of language. Title 360px uppercase, two lines, weight 500.
